summary: Tested The Lineup tab and LineupManagerDrawer functionality. All features working correctly: 1) The Lineup tab displays bookings with crew split enabled, 2) LineupManagerDrawer opens with Crew/Invite tabs, payment status, and Lock/Cancel buttons, 3) Fixed 'Share to Feed' error in SessionActionDrawer by adding missing user_id parameter.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when using auth user_id instead of profile id - may cause confusion

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SessionActionDrawer.js handleShareToFeed was missing user_id query parameter causing 422 error and React crash
LineupTab.js correctly fetches and displays lineups with crew split enabled
LineupManagerDrawer.js properly shows crew members with payment status, invite code, and action buttons
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test booking with invite_code ELOE76
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Lineup tab and LineupManagerDrawer are fully functional. Test booking at Test Beach with invite_code ELOE76, 2/4 crew, $25/person. SessionActionDrawer 'Post to Feed' now works correctly (fixed missing user_id parameter).

lineup_tab_displays_bookings.notes: The Lineup tab shows 'Your Lineups (1)' with Test Beach booking displaying: location, photographer, date/time, crew count (2/4), price ($25/person), 'Ready to lock!' status, 'Friends only' visibility

lineup_manager_drawer_opens.notes: Clicking 'Manage Lineup' button opens LineupManagerDrawer with title 'Manage Your Lineup'

lineup_manager_crew_tab.notes: Crew tab shows: 'You (Captain)' with Captain badge, 'Test User E1' with Pending status and $25.00 share, '2 spots available' indicator

lineup_manager_invite_tab.notes: Invite tab shows: invite code 'ELOE76' with copy button, search input for inviting by name, helpful tip about joining via code

lineup_manager_action_buttons.notes: 'Lock Lineup & Confirm Session' button visible (green), 'Cancel Lineup' button visible (red outline)

session_action_drawer_post_to_feed.notes: Fixed missing user_id parameter. Now shows proper toast error 'Session already posted to feed' instead of React crash

bug_fix_applied.issue: handleShareToFeed function was calling API without user_id query parameter
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added user_id=${user.id} to the API call URL
